title: A Dangerous Island Picnic
description: On pages 9–11, a dangerous island picnic as usopp is inspired by the giants’ courage, while the crew’s separate groups are pulled deeper into Little Garden’s hazards.
scene: A Dangerous Island Picnic. Usopp is inspired by the giants’ courage, while the crew’s separate groups are pulled deeper into Little Garden’s hazards. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This is definitely not normal!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Otherwise, why would a tiger, King of the jungle, collapse covered in its own blood!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: 37. What do you think of

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Alright, then it's decided. We are to not set foot on this island!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let's just quietly wait on our ship,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And leave the very second our log pose finishes recording!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: After all, we have to hurry on to Alabasta as soon as possible.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sanji! Prepare a lunchbox!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A lunchbox?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah, a pirate lunchbox*!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I smell adventure ahead!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: W-Wait just a second!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Where do you think you're going?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: On an adventure!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Shishishi! wanna come along?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Oh no, it's too late to stop him. He's too fired up!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Sanji! Prepare my lunch- box!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Alright, just hang on a moment.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Could I come along with you!?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Sure, sure!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Even you!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yes... just standing around here doing nothing is only going to end up making me think about my worries again.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So I may as well try to clear my head until the log pose finishes recording!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It'll be fine! Carue will be by my side, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Your trusty body- guard looks too scared to even quack...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Then allow me to make a lunchbox of love for you, VIVI.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Could you also make another drink for Carue as well?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Alright, let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We'll be back!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That Miss Wednesday's got some guts.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I guess it's expected of one who infiltrated Baroque works.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Well, since I'm not doing anything either,

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I'll go for a walk.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: A walk!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yo Zoro, wait!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on a dangerous island picnic. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
